title: Panju Mittai Sela Katti Lyrics Ettupatti Rasa
stanzas: <div>Panju Mittaai Sela Katti Song Lyrics Ettupatti Rasa

Panju mittaai seela katti
pattu vanna lavukka poatu

adi Panju mittaai seela katti
pattu vanna lavukka poatu
kanji kondu poravalae
nenjukulla nee vaariyaa

thumba poovu mallu vaetti
thoda theriya yaethi katti.
vambu panna vaaravurae
vazhi vidunga neram aachu.

yaezha buthikulla
suththudhu kirukku
un iduppu kosuvathula
soochchamam irukku.
nee nelinju pogaiyila
nenjula sulukku.

vaada kaathadichu
vaattudhu maama
en kooda kuchukulla
ottikka maamaa

un kannu rendu
navvaa pazham
kaaichirukku koiyya pazham
moodi vaikaatha
thingaama veenadikkaatha

ada pullarukka pogaiyila
pulla varam kaetka vandha
thalli nikkaatha
manasa thalli vaikkaatha.

adiyae..
Panju mittaai seela katti
pattu vanna lavukka poatu
kanji kondu poravalae
nenjukulla nee vaariyaa

Oaram jaaram paathu
odhunganum padhamaa
pinna oada thannikulla
mungi kulikanum sugamaa

maama pommuriye
pozhudhuku maela
nee kamban kaattu
moolaiyila kallana pola.

adi mandha kaattu
orathila mathiyaana
nerathula kaathirukattaa
dhinamum kaathirukattaa

ada vella cholai soru vachi
kaanapoovu ellarachi
oottividatta unakku
oottividattaa..

yae pulla.
Panju mittaai seela katti
pattu vanna lavukka poatu
kanji kondu poravalae
nenjukulla nee vaariyaa

thumba poovu mallu vaetti
thoda theriya yaethi katti.
vambu panna vaaravurae
vazhi vidunga neram aachu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Panju Mittai Sela Katti conveys themes of love and joy, celebrating the beauty of relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Ettupatti Rasa, this song highlights a joyful moment, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Malaysia Vasudevan and S. Janaki.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Panju Mittai Sela Katti was composed by Deva, known for his memorable tunes in Tamil cinema.

When was this song released?

This song was released on February 14, 1997.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Panju Mittai Sela Katti from Ettupatti Rasa is a melodious celebration of love and joy. It evokes a sense of nostalgia, transporting listeners to cherished memories of happiness. The heartfelt lyrics and enchanting voices of Malaysia Vasudevan and S. Janaki create a vibrant atmosphere that resonates with audiences. This timeless classic is perfect for celebrations and gatherings, making it a beloved choice among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Panju Mittai Sela Katti from the Ettupatti Rasa is a delightful melody that captures the essence of nostalgia and joy. With the enchanting voices of Malaysia Vasudevan and S. Janaki, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and captivating music by Deva. Experience the magic of this timeless classic that resonates with every listener's heart.
stanzaMeanings: The soft cotton candy is being made, it’s a colorful treat.
Oh, the soft cotton candy is being made, it’s a colorful treat. Are you the one who brings it to my heart?
The flower is blooming, it’s time to enjoy. It’s time to stop the nonsense, let’s move on now.
In the midst of the chaos, there’s a hint of mischief in your heart. You’re like a spark in the fire.
The fun is swirling around, your waist is the center of attention. You’re like a flame in my heart.
Come on, don’t be shy, let’s have some fun together, my friend.
Let’s add a little spice to your sweetness, my friend.
Your eyes are like two ripe fruits, don’t hide them, let them shine bright.
Oh, the flowers are blooming, they come to ask for blessings, but your heart doesn’t let them stay.
Oh, the soft cotton candy is being made, it’s a colorful treat. Are you the one who brings it to my heart?
Look at the beauty, it’s time to enjoy, let’s have fun together.
Slowly and gently, let’s enjoy this moment together.
Oh, my friend, you’re like a flower blooming in the garden, shining bright.
I will come to you, just like you want me to.
Oh, the beautiful flower is waiting for the right moment, every day it waits.
Oh, the white rice is served, the flowers are blooming, everyone is enjoying, and you will enjoy too.
Hey, flowers! The soft cotton candy is being made, it’s a colorful treat. Are you the one who brings it to my heart?
The flower is blooming, it’s time to enjoy. It’s time to stop the nonsense, let’s move on now.
